reward_task.raw_reward: 1 when a nonterminal transition enters reward_goal_state, otherwise 0
reward_task.terminal_mask: g_plus slice treats reward_goal_state as terminal; no bootstrap when current or next state is reward_goal_state

terminal_masks.g_plus_slice: terminal current state s==reward_goal_state and no bootstrap on transitions with next_state==reward_goal_state
terminal_masks.real_state_goal_slice: slice g has terminal current state s==g and no bootstrap on transitions with next_state==g

update_procedure.goal_coupling: independent slices; each goal slice has its own terminal mask
update_procedure.method: synchronous deterministic full-sweep tabular backups to convergence
